title: primulina subulata var. subulata
intro: Primulina subulata var. subulata, also known as the Chinese gentian, is a type of plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family and is native to China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as gentiopicrin and gentianine. The health benefits of Primulina subulata var. subulata include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and coughs. Primulina subulata var. subulata is typically prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and it can also be used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
